# Upload Audio

## Lesson Goal

Read user-provided audio and preview it.

## What to Notice

This is where a notebook starts behaving like an app and must handle missing or surprising inputs.

## Work With the Notebook

- [Open the notebook source](https://github.com/buildLittleWorlds/marimo-audio-self-tutorial/blob/main/notebooks/09_upload_audio/notebook.py)
- Browser notebook: local-first for this lesson because it uses upload, notation, audio, or model dependencies that are not reliable in WASM.

Run locally:

```bash
uv run marimo edit notebooks/09_upload_audio/notebook.py
```

## Feedback Lens

Look for thoughtful handling of file format, stereo-to-mono conversion, and no-file states.

## Instructor Notes

Use this lesson as a small checkpoint. Before asking students to add features,
ask them to name the input, the transformation, the output, and the current
limitation. That habit will matter more in later transcription notebooks than
any one line of code.
